catalog_content:
Item Name: Suncore Foods Ultra Violet Pancake & Waffle Powder Mix, Non-GMO, 20oz (1 Pack)
Bullet Point 1: Flipping Good - A fun twist on a classic that sings with a captivating purple color made from red dragon fruit, purple sweet potato, and blue spirulina powders, our pancake and waffle mix is a super fun and easy way to whip up light and fluffy pancakes, waffles, or crepes from the comfort of your own home any time, any day
Bullet Point 2: Easy To Use - To flip the rainbow, simply add water or your preferred choice of milk, and in 10 minutes, you'll be eating fun and creative breakfast goodies! Then tuck the rest away in the resealable pouch and store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight
Bullet Point 3: Tips And Tricks - Settle the debate between pancakes, waffles, and crepes with one bag, and make them all! Easily adjust the ratio between dry and wet ingredients to get the consistency your heart desires, or pair with our other Supermixes to create a rainbow of pancakes
Bullet Point 4: Fun Tidbit - Ancient Romans were the first people to make pancakes back in the first century A.D., and they called them "Alita Dolcia," which translates to "another sweet" in Latin
Bullet Point 5: Feel Good Ingredient - Non-GMO, Suncore Foods Pancake & Waffle Powder Mixes are made of simple ingredients and are sourced, processed, and packaged with the highest standards to ensure the highest quality
Product Description: Start your morning off with a dash of delicious fun with Suncore Foods Ultra Violet Pancake & Waffle Powder Mix. A sweet twist on a classic that sings with color. Light & fluffy. Simply delicious in each bite. A breakfast fit for a crowd of all ages to enjoy and discover a fairy tale wonderland. Perfect for breakfast, brunch, quick snack and more. Go ahead and make any day, any time, the weekend by whipping up delicious purple pancakes or waffles in the comfort of your own home. Bring on the delightful violet color and celebrate fun coloring to your creations.

Unit: Ounce

Item Name: Kisko Freezies Welch's Jumbo Ice Pops 5.5 Ounce, Bulk Variety Lemonade Giant Freezies, 27 Pieces
Bullet Point 1: 𝐂𝐇𝐈𝐋𝐃𝐇𝐎𝐎𝐃 𝐍𝐎𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐆𝐈𝐀 𝐑𝐄𝐈𝐌𝐀𝐆𝐈𝐍𝐄𝐃: Welch’s Giant Lemonade Freeze Pops bring back the cherished memories of operating a lemonade stand with childhood friends during summers, offering a delightful twist on a classic experience.
Bullet Point 2: 𝐑𝐄𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐇𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐇𝐘𝐃𝐑𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: Indulge in the refreshing taste of lemonade infused into freeze pops, providing a delicious snack that not only satisfies your cravings but also gives you a significant boost of hydration, perfect for hot summer days.
Bullet Point 3: 𝐈𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐈𝐂 𝐒𝐔𝐌𝐌𝐄𝐑 𝐅𝐋𝐀𝐕𝐎𝐑𝐒: Experience the ultimate taste of summer with three iconic flavors - natural lemonade, blue raspberry lemonade, and pink watermelon lemonade, offering a variety of refreshing options to suit your taste preferences
Bullet Point 4: 𝐇𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐓𝐀𝐆𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐈𝐍𝐍𝐎𝐕𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: Founded in 1977 by the Josephs family, Kisko Products has grown from a small family business into a leader in the freeze pops industry. Committed to quality and community, Kisko continues to innovate while staying true to its roots, producing a wide range of beloved freeze pops that bring joy to families across North America and beyond.

Item Name: VAHDAM, Darjeeling Tea Leaves From Himalayas 170+ Cups (340g/12oz) Pure Unblended Darjeeling Black Tea, FTGFOP1 Grade Loose Leaf Tea | Packed & Shipped Direct From Source In India
Bullet Point 1: MAJESTIC & SUPERIOR DARJEELING TEA - Experience the allure of our Daily Darjeeling Black Tea. This popular blend features delicate Darjeeling leaf tea sourced during the peak summer harvest, offering a tea with a pronounced aroma. With medium caffeine content, it's a delightful choice for any time of the day. Enjoy its pure, unadulterated taste without milk & make it a part of your daily tea ritual.
Bullet Point 2: DIRECTLY SOURCED FROM PREMIUM PLANTATIONS - Experience the finest Whole Loose Leaf Tea, sourced from premium Indian plantations. Vacuum-sealed and packed within 24-72 hours of harvesting, it offers garden-fresh aroma and taste. Savour 100% pure tea, packed in a 3-layered moisture-resistant resealable bag for lasting freshness. Preparation: 2g of loose leaf | 200 ml water at 100° C | 3 - 5 mins
Bullet Point 3: A BRAND WITH A BILLION DREAMS - VAHDAM India is one of India's largest digitally native, global brands, shipping to over 3 million customers across 130+ countries. With an aim to bring India's finest Teas, Brew Ware, Spices & Herbs to consumers across the world under a home-grown, sustainable label with a strong commitment to people and planet.
Bullet Point 4: ETHICAL, DIRECT & FAIR-TRADE - Our innovative supply chain model ensures that you get the freshest cup of tea and our farmers get a better price for their produce. 1% of our revenue is redirected towards the education of our tea growers' children with our social initiative, Teach Me, simply wish to honour this aspiration?.
Bullet Point 5: WE CARE FOR PEOPLE & PLANET - We are now a proudly carbon-neutral & a plastic-neutral brand. We measure our overall carbon & plastic footprint & offset it via our investments in environment sustainability initiatives in India.
Product Description: Based in India, VAHDAM is transforming the traditional tea supply chain. We source garden-fresh Darjeeling teas directly from plantations and package them promptly to preserve their freshness and flavor. Our teas are shipped worldwide from our packaging facility in India, ensuring quality and authenticity. By eliminating unnecessary intermediaries, we provide exceptional tea at a fair price with efficient delivery. Additionally, our teas are certified by the Tea Board of India, Ministry of Commerce, Government of India. Experience the VAHDAM difference today

catalog_content:
Item Name: Tiesta Tea - Cozy Chai | Loose Leaf | Spiced Chai Rooibos Tea | Premium Caffeine-Free Herbal Blend | Makes Hot or Iced & Up to 200 Cups | 16oz Resealable Bulk Pouch
Bullet Point 1: SPICED CHAI ROOIBOS TEA: Crave the warmth and flavor of chai, day or night? We've got the answer: Cozy Chai Rooibos Tea! Savor this aromatic, caffeine-free blend filled with the comforting spices you love. Whether it's morning, afternoon, or evening, indulge in the soothing allure of chai without the caffeine jitters. Enjoy it hot or refreshingly iced, and relish the essence of summer with every sip.
Bullet Point 2: PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF TEA BLEND: Elevate your tea experience with our meticulously crafted premium loose leaf blend. We've sourced the finest natural ingredients, including ginger, rooibos tea, cinnamon, and black pepper, to ignite your senses. Bid adieu to disposable tea bags as you embrace the opulent richness that you can see, smell, and savor in every cup.
Bullet Point 3: RESEALABLE BULK POUCH FOR TEA LOVERS: Our charming and reusable pouch makes the ideal gift for tea enthusiasts. It offers airtight storage, ensuring your loose leaf tea stays cozy and fresh for 140-200 cups. Plus, it's a beautiful addition to your countertop.
Bullet Point 4: EFFORTLESS BREWING: Enjoy a hassle-free brewing experience with our Chai Rooibos Tea. Simply scoop 1.5 tsp of this delightful loose leaf tea blend for every 8 oz of hot water at 208 degrees Fahrenheit. Allow it to steep for 5-7 minutes to release the full spectrum of flavors. Then, savor the moment as you remove the tea pieces and indulge in your perfectly steeped cup.
Bullet Point 5: SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to complement the vibrant, sunny days of Spring and Summer. These refreshing and aromatic flavors are perfect for sipping on warm afternoons, whether you’re unwinding at home or enjoying time outdoors with friends.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium loose leaf tea blend with high-quality natural ingredients, positioned as a luxury tea experience. Resealable pouch ensures freshness, and the product is marketed as a giftable item for tea enthusiasts. The focus on aromatic spices and caffeine-free formulation suggests a mid-to-high price point targeting consumers seeking specialty teas.
